name: ASRock B850M Challenger WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (B850MCHALLENGER WIFI)
shortName: ASRock B850M Challenger WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Budget-friendly AM5 Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-8000 support, and Wi-Fi 7.
